confidence_rationale: This appears to be an educational demonstration video using gauze material rather than the standard foam appendage with marked target line. Unable to assess accuracy of ring placement relative to anatomical landmarks or measure deviation from target mark.
cannot_determine: Exact deviation from target mark - no visible marked line on gauze
Whether this represents actual task performance vs demonstration
Precise ring positioning accuracy without anatomical target
technique_summary: Educational demonstration of falope ring applicator technique using alternative materials. Smooth deployment and controlled technique demonstrated.
improvement_suggestions: Practice on standard foam appendage with marked target line
Focus on precise targeting to marked anatomical position
